summary: Bug fix verified: Creative size matching now correctly selects creatives based on requested impression dimensions. Before fix, the system always returned the first creative (300x250) regardless of requested size. After fix, bid requests for 728x90 return 728x90 creative, 300x250 returns 300x250, and 320x480 returns 320x480.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented: _get_active_campaigns() now uses find() instead of find_one() to load ALL creatives for each campaign
_find_best_matching_creative() function properly checks both banner.w/h and banner.format array for size matching
Fallback behavior is correct: when no exact match found, returns first available creative of matching type
Logging added for debugging: 'Looking for creative matching sizes' and 'Exact size match' messages help trace matching logic
seed_data_creation: Updated existing campaign (Demo 230326) with creative_ids array containing 3 different size creatives: 320x480, 728x90, 300x250
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creative size matching bug fix verified. Campaign f95a0193-6729-4042-9583-7fdd7953c5f8 now has creative_ids: ['527bbac3-464d-4f07-b61e-2c4d82965cde' (320x480), '47753d0e-2594-4ae1-a67e-74a331ec10b0' (728x90), '83e140ef-1a16-42bf-be5c-e977d0500953' (300x250)]. Campaign has geo targeting for PHL - bid requests must include device.geo.country='PHL' to get bids.

tests_passed.result: PASS - 728x90 via format array returns correct creative

creative_size_matching.root_cause: Code was using find_one() to get only the FIRST creative for each campaign, regardless of dimensions
creative_size_matching.fix_applied: Changed to find() to load ALL creatives, added _find_best_matching_creative() function that checks impression's banner.w/h and banner.format array to find exact size match

rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: The _get_active_campaigns() method was using find_one() which only returned the first creative document for each campaign. This meant that even if a campaign had multiple creatives with different sizes (300x250, 728x90, 320x480), only the first one was loaded and used for all bid responses. Fix: Changed find_one() to find() to load all creatives, and added _find_best_matching_creative() function that iterates through all creatives and matches dimensions against the impression's requested size (from banner.w/h or banner.format array).
